acknowledgement-required.description: Whether the recipient must acknowledge receipt.

acknowledgement-time.description: Date-time group (DTG) or timestamp when receipt was acknowledged.

classification.description: Classification, marking or traffic-light protocol applied to the disseminated information.

dissemination-id.description: Local, organizational or message identifier for this dissemination action.

dissemination-time.description: Date-time group (DTG) or timestamp when the information was disseminated.

follow-up-action.description: Requested recipient action, follow-up tasking or next step.

handling-instructions.description: Caveats, releasability, dissemination restrictions or handling instructions.

originator.description: Unit, organization, staff section or system that originated the dissemination.

precedence.description: Message precedence assigned for transmission or dissemination.

raw-dissemination.description: Original disseminated message, cover note, distribution record or supporting file.

recipient.description: Unit, organization, staff section, system, distribution list or individual recipient.

reference.description: Doctrine, SOP, message, URL or external reference supporting the dissemination.

related-report.description: Related INTREP, intelligence report, message or MISP event/object identifier.

release-authority.description: Authority, owner or approver authorizing dissemination or release.

description: Object template to document dissemination, distribution, precedence, acknowledgments and follow-up handling for INTREP and similar intelligence reporting.
name: intelligence-dissemination
